'''Xandel Carivus's Private Guard''' were a group of soldiers established as an elite bodyguard unit by [[Xandel Carivus]] sometime prior to him becoming head of the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends#The .22Council of Blood.22|Interim Ruling Council]], presumably on the advice of [[Nom Anor]]. After Carivus took power, he used them to purge the Council of his opponents. The Guard were all killed by [[Kir Kanos]] in the [[Battle of Ord Cantrell]].

==Appearances==
*[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 3|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 3]] {{1st}}
*[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 4|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 4]]
*[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 6|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 6]]
